songs.title: Weightless
feed: “Weightless” by All Time Low reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Weightless” by All Time Low reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 38 spots to #1.
“Weightless” by All Time Low climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 38 spots to #1.
“Weightless” by All Time Low is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 159 sales units.
“Weightless” by All Time Low is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 335 streams units.
“Weightless” by All Time Low is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 404,837 total units.
